creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Okay, so this should now build again on architectures supported by
GCC 4.8.  AArch64 and in generally newer architectures or flavors
won't, so leaving this open and re-assigning to cem as port maintainer.

Also see comment #3 by Jan.

(I believe similar issues should appear on GNU/Linux, so have you
tried reaching out to the upstream developers?)
